description: CompositionMaroon polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with embroidered logo on left chestFittingComfortWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/reverse Do not scrub Bring the preppy look back in vogue with this maroon red polo neck tee from lee. The minimalist embroidered logo and comfort Fit give a fresh look to this all time classic, while the cotton fabric will keep you dry and comfortable through all seasons. Team this tee with denims, white jeans or chinos for casual outings with friends or for brunching at the Sports club. Pair it with stylish footwear from the wide collection available at myntra to don that perfect look for brunches at the club or casual outings.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
